title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: 5D
desc: A police officer investigates a series of murders in Bengaluru. Soon, his findings help him discover the dark side of the victims.

title: Qatil Saya
desc: A police officer investigates the mystery behind unnatural deaths after taking charge of his new post at a hill station.

title: Rowdy Rakshak
desc: A special agent is assigned to protect the prime minister, who later gets assassinated. He is tasked with finding the group responsible for the assassination.

title: Police Power
desc: A police officer tries to change his younger brother, who turns to a life of crime, but he fails. He then takes on the local gangster responsible for inciting youngsters towards crime.

title: Singham Again
desc: Drawing parallels to the Ramayana, Bajirao Singham and his team embark on a mission to rescue his wife, confronting a mysterious and formidable antagonist along the way.
